user.title: Add Orphek Light
user.description: Choose how to set up your Orphek lights.

cloud.title: Tuya Cloud Credentials
cloud.description:
Enter your Tuya IoT Platform API credentials. To get these:
1. Create a free account at [iot.tuya.com](https://iot.tuya.com)
2. Create a Cloud Project (Smart Home)
3. Link your SmartLife app account under **Devices → Link Tuya App Account**
4. Copy the **Access ID** and **Access Secret** from the project overview

discover.title: Select Devices
discover.description: The following Orphek lights were found on your network. Select which ones to add.

manual.title: Manual Device Setup
manual.description: Enter the connection details for your Orphek light. You will need the Device ID and Local Key from the Tuya IoT Platform.

abort.no_devices_found: No Orphek lights found on your network. Make sure they are powered on and connected to the same network.
abort.no_new_devices: All discovered Orphek lights are already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check IP, Device ID, and Local Key.
error.invalid_api_credentials: Invalid API credentials. Check your Access ID and Access Secret.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.
